name: tw-train-catcher
description: Tribal Wars in-game snipe timing calculator with ms precision

scripts.quickbar: printf 'javascript:void(' > scripts/tw-precision-timer-v5.quickbar.js && cat scripts/tw-precision-timer-v5.min.js >> scripts/tw-precision-timer-v5.quickbar.js && printf ')' >> scripts/tw-precision-timer-v5.quickbar.js
